MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication.

Plaintiff's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
